However, adding another perspective, while bronchoscopic laser cauterization (option C), though effective for certain types of bleeding sites identified through bronchoscopy, does address active hemorrhage directly, it doesn't necessarily "prevent" future episodes unless performed prophylactically—which isn’t implied in the question stem regarding prevention measures post-hemoptysis event.
